title: Summarize a simple article
subtitle: Say the main idea in one or two sentences.
overview: Say the main idea in one or two sentences.
A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: The article is about healthy habits.
这篇文章是关于健康习惯的。
The main idea is that small changes can help a lot.
主要意思是小改变会有很大帮助。
这篇文章是关于什么的？
It is about healthy habits and small changes.
它是关于健康习惯和小改变的。

items.en: The article is about healthy habits.
items.zh: 这篇文章是关于健康习惯的。

items.en: The main idea is that small changes can help a lot.
items.zh: 主要意思是小改变会有很大帮助。
这篇文章是关于什么的？

items.en: It is about healthy habits and small changes.
items.zh: 它是关于健康习惯和小改变的。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 这篇文章是关于什么的？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It is about healthy habits and small changes.
lines.zh: 它是关于健康习惯和小改变的。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The main idea is that small changes can help a lot.
lines.zh: 主要意思是小改变会有很大帮助。

items.en: The article is about healthy habits.
items.zh: 这篇文章是关于健康习惯的。

items.en: The main idea is that small changes can help a lot.
items.zh: 主要意思是小改变会有很大帮助。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
